name: AI Hub
tagline: The governed foundation for enterprise AI
description: AI Hub by Beam Data unifies models, data, and agent workflows into one governed platform. Deployed in your cloud or fully on-prem - no AI sprawl, no shadow AI, no surprises.
key_features: AI Assistants; RAG Knowledge Base; Scalable AI Orchestration; Model & Data Governance; Cost-Controlled Scaling; Secure On-Prem/VPC Deployment; SSO/SAML/RBAC; Audit Trails; Agent Sandboxing; Department-level Segmentation
target_industries: Manufacturing; EdTech; Media & Research; Finance & Professional Services; Enterprise
target_roles: CTO; VP of Engineering; Head of AI; Chief Data Officer; Enterprise Architect; IT Leadership
pain_points_solved: Fragmented AI tools; Rogue AI experiments; Duplicate RAG pipelines; Untracked workflows; No unified governance; Zero visibility into AI cost or compliance; Shadow AI risk
ideal_customer_profile: Enterprise with 200+ employees running multiple AI tools with no central governance layer; regulated industries needing on-prem AI; organizations moving from AI PoC to production at scale
differentiators: On-prem & private cloud deployment; Unified governance across agents, models, data and workflows; Multi-agent orchestration in production; Vertical intelligence baked in; Fastest path from PoC to production
deployment_options: On-premises; Private VPC; Customer cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP)
compliance: ISO 27001; SSO/SAML; RBAC; Immutable audit logs; Data residency compliance; Agent sandboxing
pricing_model: Enterprise - contact for pricing; free demo available
objection_1_response: Generic AI tools create shadow AI and have no governance. AI Hub is the controlled layer your enterprise runs all AI on - including those tools.
objection_2: We are not ready for AI yet
objection_2_response: That is exactly why AI Hub exists - it gives you the governed foundation to start safely, then scale. We offer an AI Readiness Assessment as a starting point.
objection_3: We have security and compliance concerns
objection_3_response: AI Hub deploys fully on-prem or in your private VPC. Zero data leaves your environment. SSO, RBAC, audit trails and data residency compliance are built in from day one.
competitor_context: Unlike generic SaaS AI tools (Microsoft Copilot, OpenAI), AI Hub is private, governed, and built for enterprise production - not pilot projects.
proof_points: Clients include Samsung, EY, Mars, Globe and Mail, Sportsnet, Toromont CAT; over a decade of AI and data delivery experience
